text: Schema Conversion Tool (SCT) @ rostteamcanitin - © s * SCT is used when converting one database engine to another. e ..including DB -> S3 (Migrations using DMS) ¢ SCT is not used when migrating between DB’s of the same type ¢ .. On-premises MySQL -> RDS MySQL * Works with OLTP DB Types (MySQL, MSSQL, Oracle) e And OLAP (Teradata, Oracle, Vertica, Greenplum..) e e.g. On-Premises MSSQL -> RDS MySQL ¢ e.g. On-premises ORACLE -> Aurora
